The netting is still very dense and prevents even the smallest pests from penetrating. The bag is ideal not only for protecting the fruit but also for storing it after harvesting. Protect your apples pears grapes plums currants tomatoes or cucumbers with the Garden Bag 70 organically without the use of chemical sprays. Bag size: 70 × 48 cmNumber of pieces in the set:10 pcs

items.desc: Társasjáték Jungo: Combine and discard cards firstJungo is a card game that's perfect for a quick game with family or friends. Your task will be to get rid of all the cards from your hand. Players are dealt a certain nu…
items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Jungo:                Combine and discard cards firstJungo is a card game that's perfect for a quick game with family or friends. Your task will be to get rid of all the cards from your hand. Players are dealt a certain number of cards at the start, but the important rule is that they must not rearrange them in any way. The cards have a number from 1 to 8 or a pair of numbers on them. The player on the turn can play a card or set of cards to beat the one currently on the table. He can take the earned stitch or throw it away. If the player cannot or will not fold, he draws a card from the deck. The first to get rid of the cards wins. Jungo delights with its interesting design and is suitable for up to 5 players aged 10 and up. One game lasts 10-15 minutes.                             10+        recommended age                                3-5 players        number of players                                10-15 minutes        length of one game                    Key features of the card game JungoThe Jungo...

items.raw_desc: Diffúzor utántöltő Millefiori MILANO Fior Di Muschio utántöltő, 15 ml:The MILLEFIORI MILANO Fior Di Muschio replacement cartridge is designed for use with the Millefiori Milano electric diffuser. It has citrus-inspired notes that blend with floral and woody notes to create a fresh and intoxicating olfactory landscape. The fragrance is reminiscent of a walk among flowers and citrus fruits, immersed in the freshness of juicy oranges and mandarins and the purity of newly blooming flowers. All around you, the aromatic wood of the trees in the sun surrounds you and warms your soul. The fragrance opens with notes of orange, rose, cypress, Litsea Cubeba and mandarin. The heart develops notes of anise, ylang ylang, cedar leaves, sage and lily of the valley. The scent of amber seeds and cedar wood make up the bottom notes of the fragrance.
